title: Revenue tracking
description: Our revenue tracking tools give you a clear, comprehensive overview of your income across streaming platforms, TV shows, games, downloads, syno, user-generated content, and more. Tracking both the music and its metadata. We help you understand how and where your music earns money, but also to see what's working, spot trends and advise on follow-up. It won't feel like solving a puzzle, but like gaining knowledge to make informed decisions.
